input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.2.4
            TITLE: covers and lids must be attached with a minimum of one fastener f.10.2.3.b for each external

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.2.4: Covers and Lids must be attached with a minimum of one fastener F.10.2.3.b for each external
F.10.2.4 Covers and Lids must be attached with a minimum of one fastener F.10.2.3.b for each external 
vertical wall per section
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 50 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Covers and Lids must be attached with a minimum of one fastener F.10.2.3.b for each external vertical wall per section
